name: WF1 — CargoLink Broadcast Request to Forwarders (UPDATED)

parameters.query: SELECT forwarder_id, company_name, email, specializations FROM forwarders WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'

INSERT INTO n8n_broadcast_logs (request_id, forwarder_id, forwarder_company, email_sent, whatsapp_sent, sent_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.request_id }}', '{{ $json.forwarder_id }}', '{{ $json.forwarder_company }}', true, false, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO forwarder_bid_status (forwarder_id, request_id, status, attempted_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.forwarder_id }}', '{{ $json.request_id }}', 'PENDING', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (forwarder_id, request_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'PENDING', attempted_at = NOW()

parameters.subject: =Your request {{ $json.request_id }} is live — {{ $json.total_notified }} forwarders notified!
parameters.message:
=

Request Is Live

Hello {{ $json.user_name }},

Your freight request {{ $json.request_id }} is now live on CargoLink.

{{ $json.total_notified }}

Forwarders Notified

Quotations will arrive shortly. Log in to compare and chat with forwarders.

View Your Request →

CargoLink Platform — cargolink.sa — © 2025 CargoLink

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "request_id": "{{ $('Code: Extract Request Data').first().json.request_id }}", "forwarders_notified": {{ $('Code: Summary').first().json.total_notified }}, "message": "Broadcast complete" }
